mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student( name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{degree}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS clazz_name, COUNT(*) AS num FROM student AS s LEFT JOIN clazz AS c ON s.clazz_id = c.id GROUP BY s.clazz_id ORDER BY num;

SELECT (CASE degree WHEN 1 THEN 'middle school' WHEN 2 THEN 'high school' WHEN 3 THEN 'detailed education' WHEN 4 THEN 'bachelor' WHEN 5 THEN 'master' WHEN 6 THEN 'doctor' ELSE 'other' END) AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM student GROUP BY degree
